title: Vaso Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Vaso with a Z-Score of +4.11. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Vaso is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 46%, which is relatively low, but the heat index is still very high due to the extreme temperatures. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 8.5 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement heat wave mitigation measures immediately.
